sections.paragraph:
Original: גּזוני

Transliteration: gizônı̂y

Phonetic: ghee-zo-nee'

BDB Definition:

Gizonite = "shearer: quarryman"
  1. a descendant from or inhabitant of Gizon (otherwise unknown)

Origin: patrial from the unused name of a place

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
